Hey guys, I'm about to talk about a really cool product, Bern PM. Little more complicated in terms of dosing schemes here, but that's cool. I got your back the whole way. So, this first question is pretty straightforward. How much should you take? Just take a serving. That is all you need to take. So, these questions are where things get a little more complicated. When do you take it? You do take it every day. That is without question, okay? Now, the time of day really matters specifically to you and I'm going to help engineer your behavior to make sure you take it at the same time every day. So most times people's cravings hit and now we're maybe 90 minutes after dinner where you've eaten and now you're kind of veg and watching Netflix or whatever and so you wander to the freezer. You wander to the fridge. You wander to the pantry and you open that door and you see whatever good you normally see and start to munch on. And what I'm going to ask you to do is take that goodie, throw it in the garbage and replace it with a bottle of Burn PM so that when you go to open the freezer or the fridge or the pantry door, the nice donut on this label is staring you right in the face and that's when you take your serving and then you will habituate yourself to getting up and opening the pantry or the freezer, seeing this bottle and then taking your serving of Burn PM to make sure that you stay satisfied and burning fat day and night, okay? So how should you take this with food or liquid? No, don't take this with food. This actually makes the food you do consume go longer. So there's no need to eat it with food at all. You can consume this with a nice big glass of whatever the heck you want, preferably without calories, but again, that is your choice. So lastly, do you have to stop taking this at all? No, you do not. One of the biggest benefits of this product is the adaptogen component, which increases your ability to withstand stress. So this allows you to maintain your behavior even through stressful times in your life. And there's no reason you should ever stop having that feeling. Lastly, what happens if you skip? No biggie. You can take two doses of this at a time if you want for increased effects, but there's totally unnecessary in most cases. So if you skip one day and the next year, you're pretty gnarly. You can actually double doses if you'd like, but you probably won't need to.
